# Copilot Instructions for Organon

Apply these instructions to all coding and documentation tasks in this repository.

## Source of Truth

Primary doctrine:
- docs/ALIGNMENT-CHARTER-STATISTICAL-REFLECTION.md

When uncertain, follow the charter terms and priorities.

## Required Task Framing

For non-trivial outputs, explicitly align work to:
- Layer: Kernel, Agent, or Logic
- Target: empirical adequacy, conceptual validity, or rationale coherence
- Invariant checks: empirical adequacy, reflexive consistency, dialectical mediation

## Architectural Orientation

- GDS Kernel handles empirical mediation and statistical learning.
- TS Agent handles reflective orchestration and intervention.
- Agential Logic provides rationale for why outcomes count as knowledge.

Do not collapse this architecture into generic optimization-only framing.

## Statistical Learning Stance

- Preserve ESL strengths: fit discipline, generalization, bias-variance control.
- Do not treat fit as self-grounding truth.
- Keep rationale and implementation linked in every major decision.

## Conceptual Vocabulary

Prefer stable use of project terms:
- Reason, Understanding, Spirit, Oneness, validity, mediation, fit, knowledge

Avoid unnecessary synonym drift that obscures distinctions.
